name: Gulf Construction Services LLC
tagline: Powering Oman's infrastructure with skilled manpower & heavy equipment
description: A leading supplier of certified construction manpower and heavy machinery across Oman. Over 15 years of experience serving major oil & gas and civil infrastructure projects.

name: AlNoor Resources LLC
tagline: Your trusted partner for workforce and fleet solutions in the Kingdom
description: AlNoor Resources is a premier Saudi-owned supplier providing skilled manpower and a comprehensive vehicle fleet for construction and industrial projects across the Kingdom.

name: Emirates Equipment Trading Co.
tagline: World-class machinery & logistics for the UAE's fastest growing projects
description: Emirates Equipment Trading is a top-tier machinery supplier and logistics provider based in Dubai, serving mega-projects across the UAE with cutting-edge equipment and reliable delivery.

name: Kuwait Building Solutions Co.
tagline: Reliable manpower and heavy machinery for Kuwait's construction sector
description: Kuwait Building Solutions provides certified skilled workers and heavy construction machinery to major contractors operating in Kuwait's oil, gas, and civil construction markets.

name: Bahrain Technical Services WLL
tagline: Skilled trades and regional shipping expertise from the heart of Bahrain
description: Bahrain Technical Services specializes in supplying qualified tradesmen and coordinating cross-Gulf shipping for construction and industrial clients. Known for reliability and competitive pricing.

name: Qatar Construction Group
tagline: Fueling Qatar's vision with elite construction resources
description: Qatar Construction Group is one of Qatar's largest resource suppliers, providing manpower, machinery, and fleet services to mega-infrastructure and hospitality projects across the country.

name: Sohar Industrial Supply LLC
tagline: Heavy equipment and transport solutions for Sohar's industrial hub
description: Based in Sohar's rapidly expanding industrial zone, Sohar Industrial Supply provides construction machinery and commercial vehicles tailored for port, refinery, and logistics projects.

name: Jeddah Heavy Equipment Est.
tagline: Cranes, crushers, and cargo — Jeddah's heavy-lifting specialists
description: Jeddah Heavy Equipment provides an extensive fleet of heavy construction machinery and manages complex cargo shipping for large-scale projects on the Red Sea coast.

name: Abu Dhabi Logistics Group
tagline: End-to-end vehicle hire and freight forwarding across the GCC
description: Abu Dhabi Logistics Group operates a large fleet of commercial vehicles and manages freight and shipping services for construction, healthcare, and government clients across the GCC.

name: Dammam Workforce Hub Co.
tagline: Connecting Eastern Province contractors with ready-to-deploy workers
description: Dammam Workforce Hub is a growing supplier of skilled and semi-skilled labor for construction, maintenance, and industrial projects in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

name: Salalah Port & Logistics LLC
tagline: Gateway to the Arabian Sea — shipping and transport from Salalah
description: Leveraging Salalah's strategic port location, Salalah Port & Logistics provides comprehensive shipping coordination, cold-chain logistics, and fleet services for regional and international cargo.

name: Al Sharjah Builders Supply Co.
tagline: Affordable manpower and equipment for Sharjah's construction market
description: Al Sharjah Builders Supply offers cost-effective skilled labor and light-to-medium construction machinery hire for small and mid-size contractors operating in Sharjah and the Northern Emirates.

name: Ahmadi Industrial Equipment Co.
tagline: Supporting Kuwait's oil-belt projects with proven machinery and cargo solutions
description: Ahmadi Industrial Equipment specializes in supplying earthmoving and lifting machinery alongside cargo shipping services to the oil and petrochemical industry south of Kuwait City.

name: Riffa Construction Resources
tagline: Skilled workers and dependable vehicles across all of Bahrain
description: Riffa Construction Resources is Bahrain's trusted name for multi-trade manpower deployment and vehicle fleet hire, serving real-estate, hospitality, and industrial clients island-wide.

name: Al Wakrah Integrated Services
tagline: Local logistics and transport made simple in southern Qatar
description: Al Wakrah Integrated Services offers vehicle hire and last-mile shipping coordination for contractors working in Al Wakrah, Al Wakail, and the broader southern Qatar area.
